name: Talarith
description:
The {@creature reigar|BAM} who creates this piece of jewelry chooses its form: bracelet, brooch, diadem, or necklace. While the reigar wears the talarith, any weapon wielded by the {@creature reigar|BAM} deals an extra {@damage 1d6} force damage when it hits.
As an action, a reigar can use its talarith to summon a golem that looks just like the reigar. The golem obeys the reigar's commands and uses the {@creature reigar|BAM|reigar's} statistics, except it is a Construct that doesn't have a talar
